generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow woman who values security and stability, I've been thinking about our alliances. While some argue we should reduce commitments, history shows that strong alliances actually strengthen our national security. Look at how NATO's collective defense has deterred aggression for decades. We can't afford to weaken these bonds - it's our duty to maintain order and preparedness. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrength
